violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The top of the pizza oven is due for deep cleaning.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The tops of the pizza oven and shelves are due for deep cleaning. The top of the dishmachine is due for deep cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed pizza boxes stored on the floor in the shipping container.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. A chemical spray bottle in the kitchen was not labeled.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
